ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the league was founded */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commissioner of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain of the team */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the game belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Whether the team won the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "ppd" REAL /* Points per dart */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total rounds played */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "total_darts" INTEGER /* Total darts thrown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the award belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the award belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the schedule belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_statistics" (
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_awards" (
  "season_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season award */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the award belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the award belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the award belongs to */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_awards_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, player, team owner) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)
